headline: After Following Generative AI Every Single Day These 3 ETFs Keep Rising to the Top of My Research
summary: Tracking generative AI as a daily beat means watching dozens of funds slap the “AI” label on portfolios that look suspiciously like a Nasdaq-100 mirror. After cutting through that noise, three names keep surfacing as genuinely thoughtful ways to own the theme: the Roundhill Generative AI & Technology ETF (NYSEARCA:CHAT), the Invesco AI and Next ... headline: Micron’s Anthropic Partnership Links US$1t Valuation To AI Memory Demand
summary: Micron Technology (NasdaqGS:MU) has been named a key infrastructure partner in Anthropic's Series H funding round, which values the AI company at US$65b. The partnership underscores Micron's role in supplying memory for Anthropic's generative AI and data center buildout. Micron's market value has crossed US$1t, reflecting investor focus on AI related memory demand. Micron is best known for DRAM and NAND products that sit at the core of servers, high performance computing, and AI...
